name: @research-ecology/atelier
description: The Atelier — Ulysses' own sovereign cartographic research surface (SvelteKit 2 / Svelte 5). Renders the working sheet (current problem-thread, sources, works, bridges) through packages/domain, MemoryStore-backed in dev. Its own app, its own visual grammar (ADR 0010: two products, one kernel) — no import from apps/middle-web (work order: phase-c1-atelier-app.md).

scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
